title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited:
Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India Advisory Limited!
